text: AI is transforming the modern workplace in many ways. One major change is automation, which handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing up employees for more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart email filters and project management assistants, help teams work faster and more efficiently. However, AI is not replacing humans; instead, it encourages human-AI collaboration. Employees now use AI to analyze data, generate ideas, or solve problems, making their roles more strategic. While some jobs will change or disappear, new opportunities will appear in AI oversight and training. Overall, adapting to these changes helps workers stay valuable in an evolving job market.
